item.title: Welcome! 👋
item.description: This is my Second Brain1 - a place where I document and share my ideas, learnings, and explorations. Here you’ll find a collection of interconnected thoughts and resources that grow and evolve over time.

item.title: 1. Overview
item.description: Website deployment is divided into two stages: one-time setup (where we create the infrastructure for hosting a website based on markdown content) and maintenance ...

item.title: 2. Setup-Internal Services
item.description: Gitea We will be leveraging gitea to create two repo’s: Obsidian Vault: Empty Repo Quartz: Cloned from Public repo With these two repo’s generated we will then setup obsidian to synchronize ...

item.title: 3. Setup-External Services
item.description: Github Create Github Authorization Token In a browser navigate to github.com Navigate to Settings menus: Settings (Under menu opened from user icon in top right) Developer Settings ...

item.title: LLM Prompt Development
item.description: LLM HomeAssistant Background Home assistant recently released the home assistant release preview edition which is open source hardware specifically gear for development of a ...
